MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D.Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff K. Miranda for BD Thakor dba Bristol Hotel is present.
Defendants Lisa Laughton and Tavia Boghi are present.
Attorney Ming Chung representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed.
The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
